overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The scene transitions from a covered pedestrian walkway alongside a busy street to an open intersection, with warm morning sunlight streaming between towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, observing traffic on the adjacent street

entered.detail: angled glass and metal roof structure providing partial overhead cover
tall modern building with reflective glass windows showing city reflections
tall structure with multiple digital advertising screens
raised roadway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered sidewalk in a futuristic city. The walkway features an angled glass roof structure on the left, with a reflective glass office building rising beside it. To the right, a multi-lane street has moderate vehicle traffic, while digital billboards and an elevated highway structure are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with commercial storefronts and pedestrian waiting area

events.description: exits covered walkway and turns left onto open sidewalk at intersection corner
dark sedan drives past the crosswalk from right to left

agents.ego_description: turns left at the intersection corner and walks along the sidewalk past groups of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: person with bright pink hair standing at the corner waiting to cross the street
dark-colored sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: dark building facade with large glass windows and glowing neon signage
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall black pole with traffic signal fixtures
multiple large red and white digital billboards mounted on the building

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, leaving the covered walkway behind. The scene opens to a street corner with a commercial building featuring neon signage and digital billboards. Pedestrians with distinctive cyberpunk fashion stand waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass by, and the camera approaches the intersection crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with grid pattern road markings

events.description: steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the wide sunlit intersection
burgundy pickup truck drives across the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crosses the wide intersection diagonally toward the sunlit area ahead, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: burgundy pickup truck driving across the intersection from right to left
group of pedestrians walking on the opposite side of the intersection

entered.detail: yellow grid lines painted across the wide asphalt intersection
dense cluster of high-rise buildings visible in the distance ahead
small red utility fixture on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the wide open intersection, leaving the sidewalk behind. The ground features a distinctive yellow grid pattern marking the crossing area. Bright morning sunlight creates strong shadows and glare ahead. A pickup truck passes by as the camera continues across toward the distant skyscrapers, with various pedestrians visible on the opposite side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a wide, sun-drenched city intersection. It begins with a walk along a covered sidewalk beneath an angled glass roof, flanked by a reflective office building and a busy multi-lane street. As the camera turns left, it leaves the shelter behind to open onto a street corner filled with neon signage, digital billboards, and pedestrians in cyberpunk fashion. The scene then expands as the camera steps off the sidewalk and enters a broad intersection marked by a yellow grid pattern. Finally, the perspective pushes forward through bright morning sunlight and strong shadows, passing a pickup truck while heading toward a skyline of distant skyscrapers.
